items.title: Semantic and keyboard-accessible components: reject the invalid model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this React: Component-Based Browser Applications misconception? Because React handles events, div elements are preferable to native buttons.
hints: Compare both options with platform semantics and observable user or browser evidence.

feedback.correct: Correct. Use native semantic controls in React; event handling does not supply keyboard, role, name, or state automatically.
feedback.incorrect: That preserves the misconception. Use native semantic controls in React; event handling does not supply keyboard, role, name, or state automatically.
